resources.string: Active while inside a no-location zone, watching for new photos.
Inside %1$s — new GPS-tagged photos will be queued for review.

plurals.name: photo_monitor_notification_text_multi
plurals.item: Inside %1$d zone — new GPS-tagged photos will be queued for review.
Inside %1$d zones — new GPS-tagged photos will be queued for review.

plurals.name: ongoing_with_pending
plurals.item: %1$d photo waiting for review. Tap to authorize.
%1$d photos waiting for review. Tap to authorize.

resources.string: Notifies when photos taken inside a zone are waiting for the GPS strip to be authorized.

plurals.name: review_notification_text
plurals.item: %1$d photo with GPS data — tap to authorize stripping.
%1$d photos with GPS data — tap to authorize stripping.
